title: selaginella lauterbachii
intro: Selaginella lauterbachii, also known as the "bird's nest fern," is a type of non-vascular, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Native to the tropical regions of the Pacific, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella lauterbachii include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce stress and anxiety. Selaginella lauterbachii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which have been used to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
